title: SuperDARN (Super Dual Auroral Radar Network)
short description: SuperDARN (Super Dual Auroral Radar Network) is an international radar network used for scientific purposes. The network is used to study plasma convection in the upper atmosphere.
description: **SuperDARN (Super Dual Auroral Radar Network)** (sometimes known as *The Grasshopper*) is an international radar network used for scientific purposes. The network is used to study plasma convection in the upper atmosphere. All worldwide sites are operated by various research organizations and universities.
